comment: Exact spoken lines to pre-render with cloud TTS. These MUST match the strings in PetApp/PetApp/Services/DailyPrompts.swift byte-for-byte, because the runtime looks up each clip by SHA-256 of the spoken text. English only on this branch; add translated lines on the localization branch.
lines: Did you go outside today?
Where did you go, and how was the weather?
Did you have something good to eat today?
What was it, and who made it?
Did you talk with anyone today?
Who was it, and what did you talk about?
Did anything make you smile today?
What was it?
Did you watch or listen to anything today?
What was it, and did you enjoy it?
Did you sleep well last night?
Did you dream about anything?
Did you see family or a friend today?
Who did you see, and what did you do together?
Did you get any little jobs done today?
What did you get to?
What made you smile today?
What is a favourite memory from your childhood?
Who is someone you are grateful for?
What is a song that means a lot to you?
Where is a place you have always loved?
What is something kind you did or saw recently?
What is a meal that reminds you of home?
What is a small thing that brought you joy today?
Tell a story about a good friend.
What are you looking forward to?
